description: Currently setSnsPartialParam sends a single byte. Wave Number (offset 0x35, 4 nibble bytes) and Phrase Number (offset 0x37, 4 nibble bytes) need a nibblized write method. Add DeviceState::set_sns_partial_nib_param and corresponding WASM binding. Wire into the OSC panel so PCM wave number is editable.
title: Support nibblized multi-byte param writes for SN-S wave number and phrase number
